title: RFQ2BOQ Phase 9 — Final Completion Report
summary: 96.9% corpus coverage, 0 failures, 2 code fixes applied

code_fixes.issue: Sheet selector returned first sheet with >=3 rows (Sheet1: title+1 data row) instead of richest sheet (Sheet2: 24 data rows) for ARFF.xlsx
code_fixes.fix: Score all sheets by numeric data content, pick highest-scoring candidate
code_fixes.impact: ARFF.xlsx now extracts 17 items (was 0). All existing tests pass.

code_fixes.issue: ARFF.xlsx classified as COMPLIANCE_CHECKLIST because it had a Complaince column, but that column was 90% empty (optional tracking field, not a real checklist)
code_fixes.fix: Added sample_row fill-ratio check: if reply/compliance column is <30% populated, treat as BOQ not checklist
code_fixes.impact: Unblocked ARFF extraction. Real compliance checklists with populated reply columns remain correctly classified.

code_fixes.issue: AppTest regression: at.main only accessible after at.run()

limitations: 15 scanned PDFs remain unprocessed — Tesseract OCR takes >10min each with 0 extractable text result.
DOCX not handled by Pipeline (2 spec-only files, 0 items — acceptable since theyre specs not BOQs).
Multi-file upload not testable via AppTest (st.file_uploader lacks accept_multiple_files).
9 PDFs + 3 XLSX legitimately return 0 items (spec docs, TDS forms — not BOQs).
